productDisplayName: Jockey Lace Stretch Black Bikini Brief
description: In the past, looking good meant compromising your comfort, but now, jockey briefs for women aims to change all that. jockey uses a variety of extra comfy and stretchy fabrics to create the most fashionable women's underwear styles. You can be sure that when you wear panties from Jockey, you're choosing all-day comfort. Now, looking good can be comfortable too! Made of 94% combed cotton and 6% elastane stretch fabric, providing superior comfort and flexibility Low rise bikini fits fabulously just below the waistline Delightful lace trim that sits comfortably on your body Modern low rise styling Sheer and soft elastic for feminine look and feel Available in beautiful colours to compliment you Wash care Machine wash delicate at 40 degrees with like colours Do not bleach, iron or dry clean Flat dry in shade
